demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate, who is present tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is racing so fast it feels like it will explode, I can't stop shaking, and I'm sweating through my clothes. I can't even get out of the chair on my own anymore.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It got dramatically worse tonight — the racing and shaking won't stop and I couldn't stand up safely, so my roommate called for help.

symptom_narrative.onset: the racing heart and shaking have been building over the past two months, but tonight they suddenly got much worse
symptom_narrative.duration: about two months of gradual change, with a severe escalation over the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: a constant pounding, racing heartbeat even while sitting still, a fine trembling of the hands so bad I can't hold a glass, and drenching sweats
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — it feels relentless and frightening, like my body is stuck in overdrive
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest for the pounding, my hands for the shaking, and all over for the sweating and heat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the racing is constant tonight, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help; sitting still doesn't slow it down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement or trying to stand makes the racing and weakness worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've lost about 12 kilos in two months even though I've been eating more than usual, and I feel boiling hot all the time — I've had the air conditioning on full through winter while my roommate wears a coat
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; it has crept up over the last couple of months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't rise from a chair without help tonight, my legs feel very weak, and I'm scared of falling

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a roommate who is present and made the call; no recent illnesses reported and not taking any regular medicines

objective_data_offered.value: around 130 to 135 beats per minute, even sitting still, on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer smartwatch, not a medical-grade monitor; cannot tell rhythm

objective_data_offered.value: 145 over 60 on a home blood-pressure cuff
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff

objective_data_offered.value: 98 percent on a home fingertip oximeter
58 kg tonight, down from about 70 kg two months ago
visibly trembling hands at rest, sweaty and flushed, and eyes that look like they are bulging or staring more than usual
roommate says the patient's eyes have looked increasingly prominent and staring over recent weeks, and there are thickened patches of skin on the front of both shins
